message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-14pu1 (MultiGraph constructor parity)

Fixed in commit 9c889e1. Both defects resolved:
- dict-of-lists into undirected MultiGraph now dedupes via the
  seen-source set (matches nx.from_dict_of_lists)
- 3-level dict-of-dicts auto-detected vs 4-level via inner-most
  dict shape; explicit multigraph_input kwarg now threaded
  through

Sweep: 6581 passed, 0 failed (+9 new regression tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
